Ticket #22: npx create-flotilla installer -- Codi. Published as create-flotilla@0.1.0.
Ticket #30: Flotilla Kanban parser + normalized ticket model -- Codi. GET /fleet/api/kanban live.
Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.
Ticket #33: Add search to Memory Tree -- Gem. Dynamic filtering for docs and lessons live.
Ticket #34: Install PocketBase + create DB schema -- Gem. ARM binary installed, 5 collections with API rules live.
Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.

Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.

Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.

Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.

Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.

Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

else:

Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.

Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

stdout: Ticket #10: KeyVault (Infisical EU) -- wired into music-video-tool and CRM -- Clau.
Ticket #23: README + docs overhaul -- Gem.
Ticket #24: Onboarding wizard + Doctor + commit step -- Codi.
Ticket #25: Demo cleanup -- generic agents, Agentic CRM as North Star -- Gem.
Ticket #26: EU Compliance Review -- Misty. COMPLIANCE.md v2 with gap table for audit logs, multi-agent transparency, Cybersecurity Act classification.
Ticket #27: Fleet config -- absorbed into #24. meta.installation block in fleet_meta.json -- Codi.
Ticket #28: Fleet Doctor -- absorbed into #24 -- Codi.
Ticket #29: GEMINI.md template -- Gem. Added to blueprint.
Ticket #22: npx create-flotilla installer -- Codi. Published as create-flotilla@0.1.0.
Ticket #30: Flotilla Kanban parser + normalized ticket model -- Codi. GET /fleet/api/kanban live.
Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.
Ticket #33: Add search to Memory Tree -- Gem. Dynamic filtering for docs and lessons live.
Ticket #34: Install PocketBase + create DB schema -- Gem. ARM binary installed, 5 collections with API rules live.
Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #22: npx create-flotilla installer -- Codi. Published as create-flotilla@0.1.0.
Ticket #30: Flotilla Kanban parser + normalized ticket model -- Codi. GET /fleet/api/kanban live.
Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.
Ticket #33: Add search to Memory Tree -- Gem. Dynamic filtering for docs and lessons live.
Ticket #34: Install PocketBase + create DB schema -- Gem. ARM binary installed, 5 collections with API rules live.
Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.

Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.

Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.

Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.

Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.

Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

else:

Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.

Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

stdout: Ticket #10: KeyVault (Infisical EU) -- wired into music-video-tool and CRM -- Clau.
Ticket #23: README + docs overhaul -- Gem.
Ticket #24: Onboarding wizard + Doctor + commit step -- Codi.
Ticket #25: Demo cleanup -- generic agents, Agentic CRM as North Star -- Gem.
Ticket #26: EU Compliance Review -- Misty. COMPLIANCE.md v2 with gap table for audit logs, multi-agent transparency, Cybersecurity Act classification.
Ticket #27: Fleet config -- absorbed into #24. meta.installation block in fleet_meta.json -- Codi.
Ticket #28: Fleet Doctor -- absorbed into #24 -- Codi.
Ticket #29: GEMINI.md template -- Gem. Added to blueprint.
Ticket #22: npx create-flotilla installer -- Codi. Published as create-flotilla@0.1.0.
Ticket #30: Flotilla Kanban parser + normalized ticket model -- Codi. GET /fleet/api/kanban live.
Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.
Ticket #33: Add search to Memory Tree -- Gem. Dynamic filtering for docs and lessons live.
Ticket #34: Install PocketBase + create DB schema -- Gem. ARM binary installed, 5 collections with API rules live.
Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.
Ticket #67: Setup wizard + doctor update for v0.2.0 -- Codi/Clau. Added deployment/integration steps, aligned doctor checks with Telegram/OpenClaw/GitHub Sync/Hybrid scripts, and added a package-level `verify:dry-run` smoke gate before publish. Package bumped to v0.2.0.
Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.
Ticket #59: Make OpenClaw optional -- Codi. Ping check at startup, installer opt-in, docs updated. Approved.
Ticket #60: /demo mock data -- Gem. 4 agents (Aria/Rex/Nova/Sage) + ShopFlow project cast. Deployed to DO server. Approved.
Ticket #64: Heartbeat dots tooltips & mock status -- Gem/Clau. Mock working/idle in demo, styled tooltips on all dots. Approved.
Ticket #65: Deployment scenarios docs -- Gem. Local/Cloud/Hybrid comparison table added to README. Approved.
Ticket #66: Agent health monitoring -- Codi. Skill-based reassignment on stale heartbeat (>30m). Approved.
Ticket #68: Write v0.2.0 release notes -- Clau. Approved.
Ticket #53: Release create-flotilla v0.2.0 -- include new fleet features -- Clau. Published `create-flotilla@0.2.0` to npm on 2026-03-16 after token-based Infisical publish flow verification. Consolidated PB tasks #47 and #50. Closed.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

Ticket #22: npx create-flotilla installer -- Codi. Published as create-flotilla@0.1.0.
Ticket #30: Flotilla Kanban parser + normalized ticket model -- Codi. GET /fleet/api/kanban live.
Ticket #31: Flotilla Kanban UI tab -- Gem. 3-column unified board + refresh logic live.
Ticket #33: Add search to Memory Tree -- Gem. Dynamic filtering for docs and lessons live.
Ticket #34: Install PocketBase + create DB schema -- Gem. ARM binary installed, 5 collections with API rules live.
Ticket #35: Create `~/fleet/` directory structure -- Clau. All agent workspace dirs created, MISSION_CONTROL in position.
Ticket #36: Build `dispatcher.py` + Telegram notifications -- Gem. Dispatcher live with Mac Mini paths, Telegram notify for waiting_human.
Ticket #37: Create fleet Python venv -- Clau. `~/fleet/.venv` created with `requests`.
Ticket #40: Gem fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Gem. `~/fleet/gem/GEMINI.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #38: launchd plists: PocketBase + dispatcher -- Clau. Both KeepAlive services running. Dispatcher live via infisical run (TELEGRAM_TOKEN injected from vault).
Ticket #39: launchd heartbeat plists: Gem + Codi -- Clau. Staggered at :00 and :02, node path fixed for launchd limited PATH.
Ticket #41: Codi fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Codi. `~/fleet/codi/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol, `~/fleet/codi/PROGRESS.md` initialized.
Ticket #44: Live Fleet auth/bootstrap and dashboard recovery -- Codi. Fixed `api.robotross.art/fleet` login loop, restored lessons/inbox/standups/user management, redeployed `salesman-api`, and documented the auth failure in lessons learned.
Ticket #42: Clau fleet mandate + heartbeat protocol -- Clau. `~/fleet/clau/CLAUDE.md` created with 6-phase heartbeat protocol.
Ticket #43: Fleet Hub: Tasks tab + Activity feed + Heartbeat indicators -- Gem. Board, activity feed, and heartbeat dots (PocketBase REST) live.
Ticket #32: Mission Control format hardening -- Clau. `**#N**` format normalized, closed rows purged from OPEN table, status values corrected to spec. v1 Kanban contract documented in `AGENTS/CONTEXT/kanban_format_spec.md`.
Ticket #45: Telegram Listener Bridge (Two-Way Chat) -- Gem. `telegram_bridge.py` deployed to `~/fleet/`, `fleet.bridge` launchd service running with Infisical secret injection. Two-way: inbound TG→PB, outbound PB comments→TG.
Ticket #46: Telegram Bridge outbound truncation fix -- Clau. Fixed bridge stuck in retry loop on comments >4096 chars (Telegram limit). Truncates to 4096 with `...` suffix. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #47: Big Bear homepage: Flotilla CTA and positioning refresh -- Codi. Hero repositioned around “The Docker of AI Agents,”
Ticket #48: Telegram bot `/commands` + real PocketBase task routing -- Clau. Registered 9 slash commands via setMyCommands. All commands (/clau /gem /codi /ask /spec /go /status /tasks /help) now create real PocketBase tasks or query/reply inline. Bridge restarted.
Ticket #49: Fix Codi launchd invocation — trusted directory error -- Codi+Clau. Codi updated `dispatcher.py` with `-C agentic-fleet-hub --add-dir fleet` flags. Clau applied same fix to `fleet.codi.plist`. Both invocation paths now match; error resolved.
Ticket #50: Add `/claw` Telegram command → OpenClaw gateway -- Clau. Enabled `gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions` in `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`. Added `/claw` to fleet bridge — forwards message to `localhost:18789/v1/chat/completions`, replies inline synchronously.
Ticket #52: Vault-safe OpenClaw bridge token resolution + docs sync -- Codi. Removed hardcoded gateway token from telegram bridge, resolve token from Infisical-injected env or local OpenClaw config, synced live/package/blueprint bridge code, and documented Telegram command routing plus secret-handling rules.
Ticket #51: Fix dispatcher `waiting_human` notification spam -- Gem. Added de-dup cooldown (1h) and verified human-reply-to-todo-flip logic. Dispatcher live in `~/fleet/`.
Ticket #54: Update demo page -- showcase new Agentic CRM fleet features -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/demo/` with Kanban board, live heartbeat indicators, and activity feed.
Ticket #55: Update growth page -- reflect new fleet capabilities in Sales & Marketing demo -- Gem. Updated `api.robotross.art/growth/` with live tracking and coordination highlights.
Ticket #58: Dynamic Telegram bot commands from fleet_meta.json -- Clau (took over from stuck Codi). `load_fleet_meta()` + `build_bot_commands()` added to bridge. 5 agent commands loaded dynamically at startup. Bridge restarted clean.
Ticket #62: /demo polish — kanban, memory, standups, user mgmt, modal scroll -- Clau (took over from Gem quota-blocked). All 5 sections (A-E) implemented and pushed to salesman-cloud-infra master.
Ticket #56: Sync /demo and /growth UI assets to match /fleet redesign -- Gem/Clau. Assets synced and committed to repo. Deployed to DO server.
Ticket #61: Fleet Hub UI redesign — tool aesthetic + dark/light mode -- Gem/Clau. CSS token system, [data-theme="dark"] + prefers-color-scheme, GitHub-style palette. Committed and deployed to /fleet, /demo, /growth.
Ticket #63: Hybrid dashboard sync via pushed PocketBase snapshot -- Codi. Added `fleet_push.py` + `fleet.push.plist`, snapshot ingest at `POST /fleet/snapshot`, server fallback for `heartbeats`/`tasks`/`activity`, deployed to Mac Mini + DO server. Fixes remote grey dots when PocketBase stays local.

Ticket #57: GitHub Issues ↔ PocketBase two-way sync -- Clau. `github_sync.py` deployed as `fleet.github` launchd service. Outbound+inbound sync live. `close_approved_issues()` bug fixed. Script+plist synced to package/blueprint. Approved.

{"command": "cd /Users/miguelrodriguez/projects/agentic-fleet-hub && python3 -c "
import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
                description = match.group(2)
                print(f'Ticket #{ticket_id}: {description}')
else:
    print('No CLOSED tickets section found')
""}

import re

# Read MISSION_CONTROL.md
with open('MISSION_CONTROL.md', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the CLOSED tickets section
closed_section_match = re.search(r'### CLOSED\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n###|\n\*\*Status:|$)', content)

if closed_section_match:
    closed_list = closed_section_match.group(1)
    
    # Parse each ticket
    for line in closed_list.strip().split('\n'):
        if line.strip():
            # Handle both single tickets (#123) and ranges (#1-#6)
            match = re.match(r'- \*\*#(\d+(?:-\d+)?)\*\*: (.+)', line)
            if match:
                ticket_id = match.group(1)
